title: Smile.jar
description: based off of ClaytonM634's Minecraft series
body: This Minecraft mod is inspired by ClaytonM634’s series and introduces a variety of new content to enhance the game. It adds four new types of wood, a new ore, and three new types of bricks, providing more building and crafting options. Additionally, the mod features new mobs, adding more diversity to the world. For the best visual experience, it's recommended to use the Golden Days texture pack alongside the mod, as it complements the aesthetic of the added materials. This mod is perfect for players looking to expand their gameplay with fresh resources, unique blocks, and interesting new creatures while maintaining a nostalgic feel.
